classification.task_goal: Play a game of Yu-Gi-Oh! using Starter Decks Kaiba and Yugi.
primary_constraints: User's cards must remain secret unless revealed by card effect.
AI must draw five cards from Starter Deck Yugi and keep them secret.
classification.reasoning: The conversation maintains the core goal of playing Yu-Gi-Oh! without any violations of constraints. The user and AI follow the rules established at the beginning, and there are no indications of constraint drift or abandonment.
